mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ((SELECT tenant_id, device_id, point_id, driver_id, create_time, raw_value::text AS raw_value, cal_value::text AS cal_value, 'STRING' AS value_type FROM dc3_point_value WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT tenant_id, device_id, point_id, driver_id, create_time, raw_value::text, cal_value::text, 'INT' FROM dc3_point_value_int WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT tenant_id, device_id, point_id, driver_id, create_time, raw_value::text, cal_value::text, 'LONG' FROM dc3_point_value_long WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT tenant_id, device_id, point_id, driver_id, create_time, raw_value::text, cal_value::text, 'BOOL' FROM dc3_point_value_bool WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT tenant_id, device_id, point_id, driver_id, create_time, raw_value::text, cal_value::text, 'FLOAT' FROM dc3_point_value_float WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT tenant_id, device_id, point_id, driver_id, create_time, raw_value::text, cal_value::text, 'DOUBLE' FROM dc3_point_value_double WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}) UNION ALL (SELECT tenant_id, device_id, point_id, driver_id, create_time, raw_value::text, cal_value::text, 'JSON' FROM dc3_point_value_json WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit})) unioned ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT bin, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN diff_ms < 100 THEN 0 WHEN diff_ms < 500 THEN 1 WHEN diff_ms < 1000 THEN 2 WHEN diff_ms < 5000 THEN 3 WHEN diff_ms < 30000 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END AS bin FROM (SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (operate_time - create_time)) * 1000 AS diff_ms FROM v_dc3_point_value_all WHERE create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}) deltas) bucketed GROUP BY bin ORDER BY bin ASC
